98e45c63.name: combined_rsi_ema_thresholds
98e45c63.explanation: Mutated the parent by combining fast RSI with RSI-14 and EMA-20 confirmation, tightening the buy and sell thresholds while preserving the template structure.

cb3e8a90.name: rsi14_ema20_confluence_v2
cb3e8a90.explanation: Tightened the oversold buy condition by requiring RSI 14 below 30, RSI 2 below 22, and EMA 20 above zero; raised the overbought sell threshold to RSI 14 above 72.

729b2b69.name: rsi2_rsi14_ema20_mutation
729b2b69.explanation: Tightens the RSI 2 thresholds and combines them with RSI 14 plus positive EMA 20 confirmation for entries and exits.

70657754.name: RSI Confirmation Mutation
70657754.explanation: Combines fast RSI with slower RSI confirmation, using tighter oversold/overbought thresholds than the template.

8e972c97.name: combined_rsi_dynamic_signal
8e972c97.explanation: Mutated the empty parent into a simple RSI-based strategy using stricter oversold/overbought thresholds and requiring agreement between fast and slow RSI signals.

e1af2ab8.name: dynamic_rsi_ema_combo
e1af2ab8.explanation: Mutated the parent strategy by combining short-term RSI, medium-term RSI, and a positive EMA trend filter to generate buy/sell signals.

f1e7a563.name: rsi_2_14_threshold_combo
f1e7a563.explanation: Mutates the empty parent into a simple RSI-based strategy using tighter thresholds and requiring agreement between fast and slow RSI signals.

dffed49a.name: rsi_2_14_ema_momentum_filter
dffed49a.explanation: Mutates the template by tightening oversold/overbought RSI-2 thresholds and requiring confirmation from RSI-14 plus a positive EMA-20 baseline before signaling.

a9ebfa6a.name: rsi_2_14_ema_guard_mutation
a9ebfa6a.explanation: Mutates the parent by adding combined RSI-2 and RSI-14 thresholds with an EMA guard: buy on confirmed oversold conditions, sell on confirmed overbought conditions.

c4edfad9.name: adaptive_rsi_ema_thresholds
c4edfad9.explanation: Tightens RSI extremes and requires broader RSI confirmation with EMA presence before emitting buy or sell signals.

fa0841ec.name: rsi_ema_confluence_mutant
fa0841ec.explanation: Adjusted RSI thresholds to be slightly less extreme and added EMA_20 confirmation to both buy and sell signals.

27920460.name: tightened_rsi_confirmation
27920460.explanation: Tightened the buy and sell RSI confirmation thresholds by requiring lower rsi_2/rsi_14 for buys and higher rsi_2/rsi_14 for sells.

d50b0123.name: rsi_18_82_ema_confirmed_reversal
d50b0123.explanation: Tightens oversold and overbought RSI-2 triggers while keeping RSI-14 and EMA-20 confirmation for both buy and sell signals.

a2098183.name: rsi_2_extreme_with_rsi14_confirmation
a2098183.explanation: Tightens oversold/overbought RSI-2 thresholds and requires RSI-14 confirmation before generating Gemini signals.

94bf4fb1.name: tighter_rsi_trend_filter
94bf4fb1.explanation: Tightened the short RSI thresholds and kept RSI-14 plus EMA trend confirmation for both buy and sell signals.

4c2ef73d.name: rsi_extreme_mean_reversion
4c2ef73d.explanation: Tightened RSI thresholds so buys only trigger on deeper oversold conditions and sells on stronger overbought conditions, while still requiring trend confirmation from ema_20.

2817bc66.name: Tighter_RSI_EMA_Filter
2817bc66.explanation: Tightened RSI thresholds and kept EMA confirmation to reduce trade frequency.

2c4930f9.name: Tighter RSI Confirmation
2c4930f9.explanation: Tightens the oversold and overbought RSI thresholds while still requiring RSI 14 confirmation and a positive EMA 20.

801fdf87.name: tight_rsi_reversal_thresholds
801fdf87.explanation: Mutated the parent by tightening the short RSI extremes and making the medium RSI confirmation stricter for both buy and sell signals.

a5a16e99.name: rsi_tightened_12_38_88_62
a5a16e99.explanation: Tightened the RSI entry/exit conditions while keeping the same structure and RSI confirmation logic.

55c52f33.name: Tighter RSI Confluence
55c52f33.explanation: Requires stronger RSI confirmation for entries and exits while adding a positive EMA guard.

46ff7007.name: tighter_rsi_ema_filter_v1
46ff7007.explanation: Tightened short-term RSI thresholds and kept the 14-period RSI and EMA filters to reduce false entries.

ec645cc7.name: tighter_rsi_extremes_with_ema_filter
ec645cc7.explanation: Tightens fast RSI extremes, uses RSI-14 confirmation, and keeps an EMA availability filter.

411e8fe0.name: rsi_mean_reversion_with_ema_guard
411e8fe0.explanation: Mutates the empty parent into a mean-reversion strategy that combines RSI(2), RSI(14), and an EMA guard to issue scaled buy/sell signals.

0f15e937.name: tight_rsi_ema_filter_v2
0f15e937.explanation: Tightens the oversold and overbought RSI thresholds while keeping the same RSI-2, RSI-14, and EMA-20 signal structure.

f1ba9d41.name: rsi_16_84_ema_confirmed
f1ba9d41.explanation: Tightened RSI thresholds and kept combined confirmation from RSI 2, RSI 14, and EMA 20.

6645376d.name: rsi_2_rsi_14_ema_tightened
6645376d.explanation: Tightened RSI-2 thresholds and adjusted RSI-14 confirmation levels while keeping the same EMA confirmation structure.

16b9ec8a.name: rsi_extreme_with_ema_filter_v2
16b9ec8a.explanation: Tightened RSI-2 extreme thresholds and keeps RSI-14 confirmation plus a positive EMA-20 trend filter before emitting buy or sell signals.

ac1eaff5.name: rsi_confluence_thresholds
ac1eaff5.explanation: Mutated the baseline by adding RSI-2/RSI-14 confluence with adjusted thresholds and EMA presence checks for buy/sell signals.

2cde3ec5.name: rsi_2_14_ema_trend_filter_v3
2cde3ec5.explanation: Tightens the RSI_2 triggers, adds RSI_14 confirmation, and keeps EMA_20 as a positive trend filter.

21395c77.name: Stricter_RSI_Trend_Filter
21395c77.explanation: Mutated the parent by tightening both oversold and overbought RSI thresholds while keeping the same combined rsi_2, rsi_14, and ema_20 signal structure.

43a500b4.name: rsi_ema_confluence_mutant
43a500b4.explanation: Combines short RSI, medium RSI, and EMA confirmation with shifted thresholds to reduce false entries.

ba921d0a.name: balanced_rsi_ema_mutation
ba921d0a.explanation: Loosens the short RSI thresholds and adds a mild RSI-14 filter with the existing EMA trend guard.

eae869e6.name: tighter_rsi_confirmation
eae869e6.explanation: Requires a deeper RSI-2 oversold reading with RSI-14 below 42 for buys, and a stronger RSI-2 overbought reading with RSI-14 above 58 for sells.

15642ad3.name: stricter_rsi_14_ema_combo
15642ad3.explanation: Tightens oversold/overbought confirmation by requiring both RSI signals plus positive EMA momentum.

c2104868.name: gemini_rsi_ema_threshold_shift
c2104868.explanation: Adjusted thresholds: buy triggers on deeper short-term oversold conditions with RSI(2) below 18 and RSI(14) below 35, while sell triggers on stronger overbought pressure with RSI(2) above 82 and RSI(14) above 65, both requiring positive EMA(20).

458177b5.name: tighter_rsi_2_14_ema20_filters
458177b5.explanation: Mutated the parent by tightening the short-term RSI entry/exit thresholds and requiring confirmation from RSI 14 plus a positive EMA 20 trend filter.

1d048491.name: rsi14_ema20_confirm
1d048491.explanation: Tightened the RSI-2 thresholds and required RSI-14 confirmation plus a positive EMA-20 for both buy and sell signals.

d44d19ac.name: rsi_2_14_dynamic_thresholds
d44d19ac.explanation: Mutated the template by tightening the RSI-2 extremes and adding RSI-14 confirmation for both buy and sell signals.

6dbb37b2.name: tightened_rsi_mean_reversion
6dbb37b2.explanation: Tightened the RSI-2 and RSI-14 thresholds to require stronger oversold/overbought confirmation while keeping the same combined signal structure.

e9d23bc9.name: rsi_fast_broad_filtered
e9d23bc9.explanation: Combines fast RSI oversold/overbought thresholds with broader RSI confirmation to reduce noisy signals.

b65961ab.name: tighter_rsi_ema_filter
b65961ab.explanation: Tightened both oversold and overbought thresholds while keeping the same RSI-2, RSI-14, and EMA-20 signal combination logic.
